schemes.name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
schemes.benefit: ₹6,000/year (3 installments of ₹2,000 each)
schemes.description: Direct income support to all landholding farmer families with cultivable land. The amount is transferred directly to bank accounts.
schemes.howToApply: Register online at pmkisan.gov.in or visit your nearest CSC (Common Service Centre)

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
schemes.benefit: Health cover up to ₹5,00,000/year per family
schemes.description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment at empaneled hospitals for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
schemes.howToApply: Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in or visit nearest empaneled hospital with Aadhaar

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
schemes.benefit: Interest subsidy up to ₹2,67,000 on home loan
schemes.description: Housing for All by 2022 mission providing interest subsidy on home loans for Economically Weaker Sections (EWS), Lower Income Group (LIG), and Middle Income Group (MIG).
schemes.howToApply: Apply online at pmaymis.gov.in or through banks/NBFCs

schemes.name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
schemes.benefit: ₹1,30,000 (Plain area) / ₹1,50,000 (Hilly area) for house construction
schemes.description: Financial assistance to rural BPL families for construction of pucca house with basic amenities.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office

schemes.name: PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
schemes.benefit: Loan up to ₹10,00,000 (Shishu: ₹50K, Kishore: ₹5L, Tarun: ₹10L)
schemes.description: Micro-finance loans for non-farm, non-corporate small and micro enterprises. No collateral required for loans up to ₹10 lakh.
schemes.howToApply: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI with business plan. Also available online.

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
schemes.benefit: 8.2% interest rate (2025-26) + Tax benefits under 80C
schemes.description: Small savings scheme for girl child with highest interest rate among all small savings schemes. Triple tax benefit (EEE).
schemes.howToApply: Open account at any Post Office or authorized bank branch
schemes.deadline: Girl must be under 10 years old

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000/month after age 60
schemes.description: Government-backed pension scheme for workers in unorganised sector. Guaranteed minimum pension with government co-contribution.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through your bank branch or online via net banking

schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
schemes.benefit: Free LPG connection + ₹1,600 financial assistance + 1st refill free
schemes.description: Free LPG connection to women from BPL households. New connection includes deposit-free cylinder, regulator, hose, and first refill.
schemes.howToApply: Apply at nearest LPG distributor or online

schemes.name: Stand-Up India Scheme
schemes.benefit: Loan from ₹10,00,000 to ₹1,00,00,000 for SC/ST/Women entrepreneurs
schemes.description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through banks or online at standupmitra.in

schemes.name: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
schemes.benefit: Working capital loan up to ₹50,000 + Cashback on digital transactions
schemes.description: Special micro-credit facility for street vendors to resume their livelihoods affected by COVID-19. Collateral-free loans.
schemes.howToApply: Apply online or through ULB (Urban Local Body) / CSC

schemes.name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
schemes.benefit: Pension of ₹3,000/month after age 60 for small farmers
schemes.description: Voluntary pension scheme for small and marginal farmers. Government contributes equal amount as farmer.
schemes.howToApply: Register at CSC (Common Service Centre) with Aadhaar and land documents

schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
schemes.benefit: Scholarships from ₹10,000 to ₹2,00,000/year for students
schemes.description: One-stop portal for various government scholarships for SC/ST/OBC/Minority/EWS students from pre-matric to post-doctoral level.
schemes.howToApply: Apply online at scholarships.gov.in before deadline

schemes.name: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme (PM-YASASVI)
schemes.benefit: Scholarship up to ₹1,25,000/year for OBC/EBC/DNT students
schemes.description: Scholarship for OBC, EBC, and DNT students for Class 9-12 and top-class college education.
schemes.howToApply: Apply via NTA portal and appear for YET exam

schemes.name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.benefit: Crop insurance at very low premium (1.5%-5% of sum insured)
schemes.description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme covering all food crops, oilseeds, and commercial/horticultural crops against natural calamities.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through CSC, banks, insurance companies, or online at pmfby.gov.in

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
schemes.benefit: Awareness & education support for girl child
schemes.description: Scheme to address declining Child Sex Ratio and related issues of women empowerment over a life-cycle continuum.
schemes.howToApply: No direct application — benefits are provided through district-level initiatives

schemes.name: PM-DAKSH Yojana
schemes.benefit: Free skill development training + stipend + placement support
schemes.description: Skill development scheme for SC/OBC/EWS/DNT persons in agriculture, construction, electronics, and other sectors.
schemes.howToApply: Register on portal or visit nearest training center

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.benefit: Crop loan up to ₹3,00,000 at 4% interest (after subsidy)
schemes.description: Provides timely and adequate credit to farmers for their agricultural needs including crop production, post-harvest expenses, and maintenance.
schemes.howToApply: Apply at any commercial bank, cooperative bank, or RRB

schemes.name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana (PMVVY)
schemes.benefit: Pension of ₹1,000 to ₹9,250/month for senior citizens (8% guaranteed return)
schemes.description: Pension scheme for senior citizens (60+) providing guaranteed return of 8% per annum for 10 years.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through LIC office or online at licindia.in

schemes.name: National Pension System (NPS)
schemes.benefit: Pension + Tax benefits up to ₹2,00,000 under 80C/80CCD
schemes.description: Voluntary pension scheme with market-linked returns. Additional tax benefit of ₹50,000 under 80CCD(1B).
schemes.howToApply: Apply through bank, online at NPS portal, or via CRA

schemes.name: PM KUSUM Yojana
schemes.benefit: 60% subsidy on solar pumps + ₹1,00,000 income from solar plant
schemes.description: Solar energy scheme for farmers providing subsidized solar pumps and allowing farmers to sell surplus solar power to DISCOMs.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through state nodal agency or DISCOM office

schemes.name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
schemes.benefit: Free 5 kg food grains per person per month (Rice/Wheat/Pulses)
schemes.description: Free food grains to NFSA beneficiaries. Extended under National Food Security Act.
documents: Aadhaar Card linked to Ration Card
schemes.howToApply: No separate application — use existing Ration Card at PDS shop

schemes.name: PM Shram Yogi Maandhan (PM-SYM)
schemes.benefit: Pension of ₹3,000/month after age 60 for unorganized workers
schemes.description: Voluntary pension scheme for unorganized workers. Contribution ranges from ₹55 to ₹200/month based on entry age.
schemes.howToApply: Register at nearest CSC with Aadhaar and bank details

schemes.name: PM Adarsh Gram Yojana (PMAGY)
schemes.benefit: ₹20,00,000 per village for integrated development
schemes.description: Integrated development of SC-majority villages with focus on education, health, and livelihood.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through District Collector / Gram Panchayat

schemes.name: National Fellowship for OBC Students
schemes.benefit: ₹31,000/month fellowship for PhD + ₹25,000 HRA/year
schemes.description: Fellowship for OBC students pursuing M.Phil/Ph.D. Covers JRF and SRF with HRA.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through UGC portal after qualifying NET/JRF

schemes.name: Startup India Scheme
schemes.ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry & Internal Trade
schemes.benefit: Tax exemption for 3 years + ₹10,000 Cr Fund of Funds + 80% rebate on patent filing
schemes.description: Action plan to build a strong startup ecosystem. Includes tax benefits, easier compliance, IPR support, and funding support.
schemes.howToApply: Register on Startup India portal and get DPIIT recognition

schemes.name: PM-WANI (Wi-Fi Access Network Interface)
schemes.benefit: Become a Wi-Fi provider with no license fee
schemes.description: Framework for setting up public Wi-Fi hotspots. No license required. Anyone can become a PDO (Public Data Office).
schemes.howToApply: Register as PDO on PM-WANI app or portal

schemes.name: Digital India Land Records Modernization (DILRMP)
schemes.benefit: Free online access to land records + mutation tracking
schemes.description: Computerization and digitization of land records. Online access to cadastral maps, mutation records, and sale deeds.
schemes.howToApply: Access through state land records portal (e.g., UP: upbhulekh.gov.in)

schemes.name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY 4.0)
schemes.benefit: Free skill training + ₹8,000 reward + certification + placement
schemes.description: Flagship skill development scheme providing free training in 40+ sectors. Short-term training (150-300 hours) with placement assistance.
schemes.howToApply: Register on portal or visit nearest training center (TP)

schemes.name: Mission Amrit Sarovar
schemes.benefit: Water body rejuvenation — 75 Amrit Sarovars per district
schemes.description: To develop and rejuvenate 75 water bodies in each district of the country for water conservation.
schemes.howToApply: Through Gram Panchayat / District Administration

schemes.name: One Nation One Ration Card (ONORC)
schemes.benefit: Access PDS benefits from any ration shop in India
schemes.description: Portability of ration card — migrant workers can claim food grains from any FPS in the country using Aadhaar authentication.
documents: Aadhaar Card linked to Ration Card
schemes.howToApply: Already active — use existing ration card at any FPS with Aadhaar

schemes.name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
schemes.benefit: Accidental insurance cover of ₹2,00,000 for just ₹20/year
schemes.description: Accidental death and disability insurance scheme. Covers death and permanent disability due to accident.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through your bank branch or online banking

schemes.name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.benefit: Life insurance cover of ₹2,00,000 for just ₹436/year
schemes.description: Life insurance scheme providing coverage in case of death of the insured for any reason.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through your bank branch or online banking

schemes.name: Swayam Sidha Yojana (Micro Credit)
schemes.benefit: Micro-credit loans up to ₹1,50,000 for SHG women at low interest
schemes.description: Provides micro-credit to women Self-Help Groups (SHGs) for income-generating activities.
schemes.howToApply: Through District Rural Development Agency (DRDA)

schemes.name: PM Annadata Aay Sanrakshan Abhiyan (PM-AASHA)
schemes.benefit: Price support for oilseeds, pulses, and copra at MSP
schemes.description: Ensures remunerative prices for farmers growing oilseeds, pulses, and copra through Price Support Scheme.
schemes.howToApply: Through designated procurement agencies in your state

schemes.name: National Crèche Scheme
schemes.benefit: Free childcare at crèche for working mothers (6 months to 6 years)
schemes.description: Day-care facility for children of working mothers, providing nutrition, pre-school education, and health services.
schemes.howToApply: Through nearest crèche center or District Programme Officer

schemes.name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
schemes.benefit: Free education + textbooks + uniforms + transport for school children
schemes.description: Integrated scheme for school education from pre-school to Class 12. Covers uniforms, textbooks, and transport.
schemes.howToApply: No separate application — enrolled through government schools

schemes.name: PM Dhan-Dhanya Yojana
schemes.benefit: Financial assistance for diversification to high-value crops
schemes.description: Supports farmers in 100 districts to diversify from cereals to horticulture, oilseeds, and pulses.
schemes.howToApply: Through Block Agriculture Officer

schemes.name: PM Internship Scheme
schemes.benefit: ₹5,000/month stipend + ₹6,000 one-time assistance for 12-month internship
schemes.description: Internship in top companies for youth aged 21-24. Provides real-world work experience with monthly stipend.
schemes.howToApply: Apply online at PM Internship portal

schemes.name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
schemes.benefit: Free electricity up to 300 units/month via rooftop solar + 60% subsidy
schemes.description: Install rooftop solar panels and get up to 300 units free electricity per month. Government provides 60% subsidy.
schemes.howToApply: Apply online at pmsuryaghar.gov.in

schemes.name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM)
schemes.benefit: ₹15,000-₹25,000 support for Self-Help Groups + skill training
schemes.description: Organizes rural poor into Self-Help Groups and provides financial assistance, skill training, and market linkages.
schemes.howToApply: Through Block Mission Management Unit or Gram Panchayat

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
schemes.benefit: Loan up to ₹3,00,000 at 5% interest + skill training + ₹500/day stipend
schemes.description: Support for traditional artisans and craftspeople including carpenters, blacksmiths, potters, tailors, and more.
schemes.howToApply: Apply at nearest CSC or online at pmvishwakarma.gov.in

schemes.name: National Food Security Act (NFSA)
schemes.benefit: Subsidized food grains: Rice at ₹3/kg, Wheat at ₹2/kg, Coarse grains at ₹1/kg
schemes.description: Covers 67% of population with highly subsidized food grains through Public Distribution System.
schemes.howToApply: Use existing ration card at nearest PDS shop

schemes.name: Atal Bhujal Yojana
schemes.benefit: Community-based groundwater management + financial support
schemes.description: Community-led groundwater management scheme in water-stressed areas. Focuses on demand-side management.
schemes.howToApply: Through Gram Panchayat in covered villages

schemes.name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for MSME (CGTMSE)
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free loans up to ₹5,00,00,000 for MSMEs
schemes.description: Provides credit guarantee to banks for loans given to micro and small enterprises without collateral.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through any bank branch with MSME registration

schemes.name: PM e-Bus Sewa Scheme
schemes.benefit: Electric bus deployment in 169 cities — job creation for drivers/conductors
schemes.description: Deployment of 10,000 electric buses across 169 cities under PPP model. Creates employment and improves public transport.
schemes.howToApply: Through municipal corporations in covered cities

schemes.name: NPS Vatsalya (Pension for Minors)
schemes.benefit: Pension savings for children — guaranteed returns + tax benefits for parents
schemes.description: Contributory pension scheme for minor children. Parents/guardians can invest for their child's retirement from birth. Minimum ₹1,000/year.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through banks, post offices, or online NPS portal

schemes.name: PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal Scheme)
schemes.benefit: Free nutritious lunch for school children (Class 1-8) in government schools
schemes.description: Provides free cooked meals to children in government and government-aided schools. Covers 11.80 crore children.
schemes.howToApply: No separate application — provided automatically in government schools

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
schemes.benefit: Cash assistance of ₹600-₹1,400 for institutional delivery
schemes.description: Promotes institutional delivery among pregnant women from BPL families. Cash assistance for delivery at government hospitals.
schemes.howToApply: Register at nearest ASHA worker or health center

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Urban (SBM-U)
schemes.benefit: ₹12,000 for individual toilet construction + waste management support
schemes.description: Financial assistance for construction of individual household toilets and community/public toilets in urban areas.
schemes.howToApply: Apply through Municipal Corporation or online portal

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission (Har Ghar Jal)
schemes.benefit: Functional tap water connection to every rural household
schemes.description: Ensures functional household tap connection (FHTC) to every rural household with adequate quantity and quality water.
schemes.howToApply: Through Gram Panchayat — no individual application needed

schemes.name: Deendayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
schemes.benefit: Free skill training + placement + ₹3,000-₹6,000 stipend during training
schemes.description: Placement-linked skill training for rural youth from BPL families. Training in 250+ trades with guaranteed placement.
schemes.howToApply: Register at nearest training center or online

schemes.name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
schemes.benefit: Free nutrition, immunization, health check-up for children (0-6) and pregnant women
schemes.description: Provides supplementary nutrition, immunization, health check-up, referral services, and pre-school education for children and pregnant women.
schemes.howToApply: Visit nearest Anganwadi center

schemes.name: National Scholarship for Minority Students
schemes.benefit: Scholarship up to ₹20,000/year for minority students
schemes.description: Pre-matric and post-matric scholarship for students from minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi).
schemes.howToApply: Apply online at National Scholarship Portal

schemes.name: SHG-Bank Linkage Programme
schemes.benefit: Bank loans to Self-Help Groups at 7% interest (subsidized)
schemes.description: Provides bank credit to Self-Help Groups (SHGs) of poor women for income-generating activities. Interest subvention available.
schemes.howToApply: Through bank branch or SHG federation

schemes.name: PM Adarsh Gram Yojana (PMAGY)
schemes.benefit: ₹20 lakh per village for SC-majority village development
schemes.description: Integrated development of SC-majority villages (50%+ SC population) in education, health, livelihood, and infrastructure.
schemes.howToApply: Through District Collector / Gram Panchayat

schemes.name: PM-SVANidhi to SVAVLAMBI (Street Vendor to Self-Reliant)
schemes.benefit: Upgrade path from SVANidhi to Mudra loan — up to ₹50,000 to ₹10 lakh
schemes.description: Graduation pathway for street vendors who have repaid PM-SVANidhi loans to access higher credit through Mudra.
schemes.howToApply: Automatic after SVANidhi repayment

schemes.name: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
schemes.benefit: Subsidy up to 60% for fish farming, aquaculture, and fisheries infrastructure
schemes.description: Sustainable development of fisheries sector. Financial assistance for fish farmers, fishermen, and fish workers.
schemes.howToApply: Through District Fisheries Officer or online

schemes.name: Interest Subvention Scheme for Crop Loans
schemes.benefit: Crop loan at 4% interest (instead of 7%) for up to ₹3 lakh
schemes.description: Government provides interest subvention to banks so farmers get short-term crop loans at subsidized rates.
schemes.howToApply: Through any commercial/cooperative bank

schemes.name: National Safai Karamchari Finance & Development Corp (NSKFDC)
schemes.benefit: Loans up to ₹15,00,000 at 4% interest for sanitation workers and their families
schemes.description: Financial assistance for rehabilitation of safai karamcharis and manual scavengers through self-employment loans.
schemes.howToApply: Through District Social Welfare Officer

schemes.name: PM USHA (Upgradation of State Health Systems)
schemes.benefit: Free healthcare at upgraded district hospitals and medical colleges
schemes.description: Upgrades district hospitals to super-specialty facilities and establishes new medical colleges in underserved districts.
schemes.howToApply: No application needed — use services at upgraded hospitals

schemes.name: Kanya Shiksha Pravesh Utsav
schemes.benefit: Bringing out-of-school girls back to education — enrollment drive + support
schemes.description: Special drive to enroll out-of-school girls aged 11-14 back into formal education system with community support.
schemes.howToApply: Through local education authorities or Anganwadi workers

schemes.name: PM-DAKSH Portal (Skill Training for SC/OBC/EWS)
schemes.benefit: Free skill training + ₹5,000 stipend + certification + placement
schemes.description: Online portal for skill development training of SC, OBC, EWS, and DNT persons in agriculture, construction, IT, and more.
schemes.howToApply: Register on portal

schemes.name: National ST Finance & Development Corp (NSFDC)
schemes.benefit: Loans at 4-6% interest for ST persons — up to ₹15,00,000
schemes.description: Financial assistance for economic development of Scheduled Tribes through self-employment and skill training loans.
schemes.howToApply: Through District Tribal Development Officer

schemes.name: National SC Finance & Development Corp (NSCFDC)
schemes.benefit: Loans at 4-6% interest for SC persons — up to ₹15,00,000
schemes.description: Financial assistance for economic development of Scheduled Castes through self-employment and education loans.
schemes.howToApply: Through District Social Welfare Officer

schemes.name: PM Kisan Sampada Yojana
schemes.benefit: Subsidy for food processing units — 35-75% capital subsidy
schemes.description: Scheme for creation of food processing infrastructure including mega food parks, cold chains, and processing units.
schemes.howToApply: Apply online at MOFPI portal

schemes.name: Swadhar Greh Scheme
schemes.benefit: Shelter, food, and rehabilitation for women in difficult circumstances
schemes.description: Provides shelter, food, clothing, medical care, and rehabilitation to women in distress including destitute, deserted, and trafficked women.
schemes.howToApply: Contact nearest Swadhar Greh or Women Helpline 181

schemes.name: Working Women Hostel Scheme
schemes.benefit: Safe hostel accommodation for working women at subsidized rates
schemes.description: Provides safe and affordable hostel accommodation to working women away from their hometown.
schemes.howToApply: Apply to nearest Working Women Hostel
